title: Titanium
description: It adds titanium to the game. That's about it.
body:
This is a rewrite of the Titanium mod by ipopkat, which no longer exists on CurseForge. The only remaining archive of the mod seems to be [here](https://cursefire.com/minecraft/mc-mods/titanium-gear), on CurseFire.

The new textures in Titanium 1.3.4 were made by [Jamiscus](https://modrinth.com/user/Jamiscus).

Have you ever been mining and found loads of iron but not a single diamond, and wanted something to fill that gap in progression? Here is a solution: Titanium!

Titanium is found below y=30 in the overworld and at all levels in the end, and comes in veins of up to 6 blocks. There are stone, deepslate, and end stone versions of the ore. It functions like iron, but with higher durability, mining speed, and enchantability.

The mod contains a song written by [DestoLynx](https://www.youtube.com/@DestoLynx). Explore underground to find it!
